name: Animal Sick/Death
renderer_data_template: {% with s=data.animal_species|default:"Animal" sick=data.num_sick|default:0 dead=data.num_dead|default:0 total=data.num_total_animal|default:0 disease=data.suspected_disease|default:"" age=data.animal_age unit=data.age_unit hh=data.num_household %}{{ s }}: {{ sick }} sick, {{ dead }} dead (of {{ total }}){% if disease %} · {{ disease }}{% endif %}{% if age %} · age {{ age }}{% if unit %} {{ unit }}{% endif %}{% endif %}{% if hh %} · {{ hh }} HH{% endif %}{% if data.digestive_symptoms.value %} · {{ data.digestive_symptoms.value }}{% endif %}{% if data.respiratory_symptoms.value %} · {{ data.respiratory_symptoms.value }}{% endif %}{% if data.skin_external_symptoms.value %} · {{ data.skin_external_symptoms.value }}{% endif %}{% if data.general_symptoms.value %} · {{ data.general_symptoms.value }}{% endif %}{% if data.nervous_symptoms.value %} · {{ data.nervous_symptoms.value }}{% endif %}{% if data.reproductive_symptoms.value %} · {{ data.reproductive_symptoms.value }}{% endif %}{% if data.abnormalities_carcass.value %} · {{ data.abnormalities_carcass.value }}{% endif %} · {{ incident_date }}{% endwith %}
